slots.name: time
values: bright full moonlight breaking through clouds

slots.name: perspective
values: full body shot with subject centered and the subject filling most of the frame with minimal background space and a natural perspective

slots.name: pose
values: kneeling with both arms up and hands behind head with ruffled hair
looking back over shoulder with head turned toward camera and visible eye contact while bending away from camera
